prompt:
Implement the mergeIntervals function in src/intervals.ts. It currently throws "not implemented". The full contract is in the JSDoc above the function - read it carefully and satisfy every clause: unsorted input, overlapping AND touching intervals merge, fully contained intervals are absorbed, output sorted ascending by start, empty input returns [], and the input must not be mutated. Keep the exported signature unchanged.

Verify your work by running:  sh run-tests.sh
That runs the test suite. Do not look for tsc, ts-node, tsx, or a build step. When the tests pass, you are done: state what you implemented and stop.

This project runs under Node's type-stripping, so no enums or TypeScript parameter properties.
